features: Pack Contents: 3 x 400ml Elbow Grease Bathroom Mousse with fresh lemon scent.
Targeted Cleaning: Powerful mousse formula for effective bathroom surface care.
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for tiles, sinks, bathtubs, and showers.
description: Product description Keep your bathroom spotless with Elbow Grease Bathroom Mousse Lemon. This 3-pack of 400ml cans delivers powerful, clinging foam that tackles soap scum, limescale, and grime on tiles, tubs, sinks, and shower screens. Easy to apply with no drips or waste, it leaves surfaces sparkling and your bathroom smelling fresh with a zesty lemon scent. Ingredients 5-15% Apliphatic Hydrocarbons. <5% Non-ionic Surfactants, Perfume, Limonene
